name: Helix Music Lab — Composer Fingerprint Prediction v1
description: Evaluates whether chip-music composer identity can be inferred from chip-level synthesis data, reconstructed symbolic structure, and rendered-audio MIR features.
primary_hypothesis: Models using chip+symbolic+MIR features will outperform symbolic-only and audio-only baselines on composer attribution.

inclusion_criteria.composer_source: embedded metadata tags (ARTIST field in VGM header)

success_conditions: Composer attribution accuracy > 2x random baseline under held-out evaluation
Chip-level features provide measurable incremental value (ablation delta > 0.05 top-1 accuracy)
All results reproducible from artifact outputs
